description.en: The unix_dialect class defines the usual properties of a CSV file generated on UNIX systems, i.e. using '\n' as line terminator and quoting all fields. It is registered with the dialect name 'unix'. Added in version 3.2.

description.en: Delete the dialect associated with name from the dialect registry. An Error is raised if name is not a registered dialect name.
